articles.description: Morocco declared the winners of the 2025 Africa Cup of Nations after Confederation of African Football overturns the result of their final defeat to Senegal.
articles.title: Afcon 2025: Morocco declared the winners after CAF overturns final defeat to Senegal

articles.description: Michael Olise has been in superb form for Bayern Munich this season, has the French winger put himself in contention for the Ballon d'Or?
articles.title: How Michael Olise is putting himself in Ballon d'Or frame at Bayern

articles.description: Newcastle United defender Lewis Hall renews hostilities with Barcelona star Lamine Yamal on Wednesday night and and team-mate Kieran Trippier believes he has 'all the attributes to be one of the best left-backs in the world'
articles.title: Barcelona v Newcastle: The anti-Lamine Yanal backed to be one of the best in world

articles.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka dismisses criticism of her late withdrawal from the Dubai Championships and says she may not play at the tournament again.
articles.title: Aryna Sabalenka: Late Dubai withdrawal criticism 'ridiculous'

articles.description: All the reaction from the last-16 of the Champions League as Manchester City and Chelsea are knocked out, but Arsenal sail through.
articles.title: Champions League reaction: Man City, Chelsea & Arsenal

articles.description: Pep Guardiola is one of the greatest managers of all time, but will his Champions League record be a cause for frustration?
articles.title: Will Champions League be Guardiola's Man City regret?

articles.description: Declan Rice is called "The Horse" by his Arsenal team-mates and his performance in the 2-0 win against Bayer Leverkusen again showed why he has more than earned that nickname.
articles.title: Declan Rice: How England midfielder epitomises relentless Arsenal

articles.description: BBC Sport's Umir Irfan looks at why Liverpool have struggled to replicate last season's title-winning form.
articles.title: Have Liverpool lost 'chaotic' edge that made them so feared?

articles.description: Enzo Fernandez says he does not know whether he will remain at Chelsea next season following their Champions League exit.
articles.title: Enzo Fernandez says he does not know about Chelsea future

articles.description: England back row Ollie Chessum says the fear of being run down by Louis Bielle Biarrey prevented him from running in an intercept closer to the post in defeat by France.
articles.title: Ollie Chessum: Bielle Biarrey's pace spooked me on Six Nations finale
